# (Live Workshop) Get Free SEO Training From Ben Rojas!

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-05-06 20:00:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 738

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Want to learn SEO to grow your organic traffic?

Most website owners fail to drive organic traffic because they
don't understand how their website content performs on Google.

That's why we're hosting a FREE live workshop 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..YwsCU-hFU8oVfJN6c1-T0U82imyJZNUpok9e4A1UUyg ) on May 14th
at 10.30 AM (EST).

We'll explain how to make informed decisions to boost your SEO
and organic traffic.

Get ready to learn directly from the SEO expert Benjamin Rojas,
the President of the All in One SEO (AIOSEO) plugin. He'll show
you exactly how to use AIOSEO's Search Statistics to improve your
search rankings on Google.

The best part? We'll also host a live Q&A session at the end of
the workshop where Benjamin will answer all your SEO questions.

Ready to finally break through and watch your email list soar?

👉 [Workshop] How to Use Google Data to Boost Organic Traffic! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..YwsCU-hFU8oVfJN6c1-T0U82imyJZNUpok9e4A1UUyg ) 👈

See you there,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
